target_rules: Preserve the source object name exactly unless the source SQL explicitly renames it.
Do not emit Snowflake-only object parameters or session context syntax.

unsupported_object_types.trigger: Snowflake trigger migration is not supported because Snowflake sources do not provide trigger objects in this tool.
unsupported_object_types.event: Snowflake event migration is not supported by this tool.
unsupported_object_types.cursor: Standalone cursor objects are not supported as migratable objects for PostgreSQL in this tool.
unsupported_object_types.synonym: PostgreSQL synonym migration is not supported by this tool for Snowflake sources.

table: Convert Snowflake table syntax to valid PostgreSQL DDL with compatible data types and defaults.
storedprocedure: Convert Snowflake procedure syntax to valid PostgreSQL CREATE PROCEDURE syntax.
function: Convert Snowflake function syntax to valid PostgreSQL CREATE FUNCTION syntax.
sequence: Convert Snowflake sequences to valid PostgreSQL CREATE SEQUENCE syntax when present.
